name: marble-race-simulator
description: Ultra-realistic marble race physics simulator with procedural tracks, AI marbles, and cinematic visuals

scripts.build:web: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/src/physics dist/src/render dist/src/procedural dist/src/ai dist/src/mobile dist/src/audio dist/src/replay && cp index.html styles.css app.js manifest.webmanifest icon.svg sw.js dist/ && cp src/physics/*.js dist/src/physics/ && cp src/render/*.js dist/src/render/ && cp src/procedural/*.js dist/src/procedural/ && cp src/ai/*.js dist/src/ai/ && cp src/mobile/*.js dist/src/mobile/ && cp src/audio/*.js dist/src/audio/ && cp src/replay/*.js dist/src/replay/
scripts.sync:android: npm run build:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../marble-race-debug.apk
scripts.build:release: npm run sync:android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && cp app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release-unsigned.apk ../marble-race-release.apk
